signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Some players thrive on making defenders look silly. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their fakeout rate on the next juke, spin or hurdle.
Ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable spin animations.
Ballcarriers with this ability will replenish a portion of their stamina upon successfully performing any skill move
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Aggressive receivers overpower defenders and attack the football. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on aggressive catches against single coverage.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Players with this ability avoid any ratings penalties associated with playing outside of their primary position
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
The best physical receivers don't just come down with the ball, they carry it home. When they enter the zone, they are nearly guaranteed to break their first post-catch tackle.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful truck and stiff arm animations and a larger timing window for perfect attempts.
Defenders with this ability will repair the fatigue of all defensive linemen on any 3rd or 4th down
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Pass rushers with this ability pay a reduced stamina cost for each move they attempt
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
When Selfless players are making plays their teammates are motivated to perform better. When they enter the zone, all on field teammates enter the zone as well.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Shutdown defenders have the talent to erase receivers from the game. When they enter the zone, their coverage is tighter and interceptions are more frequent on contested catches.
Pass rushers with this ability will heal some of their fatigue after sacking the QB
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.
Some players thrive on making defenders look silly. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their fakeout rate on the next juke, spin or hurdle.
Midway through the fourth quarter in close games, players with this ability can easily enter (and remain in) the Zone.
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all running backs who are open on pass plays.
Passers with this ability have faster passing animations when they are throwing under pressure
When playing at home, players with this ability can easily enter the Zone.
